package.name: g1_local_map
package.description: Local rolling 3D voxel map for G1 navigation. Consumes the DLIO deskewed, registered point cloud (/dlio/odom_node/pointcloud/deskewed, odom frame, ~10 Hz) plus DLIO odometry, removes the ground (per-cell lowest-point segmentation on the temporally-accumulated cloud), and maintains a robot-centred rolling voxel occupancy grid with decay. Publishes a ground-removed obstacle PointCloud2 to feed the a_star_mpc planner's gaussian backend, plus a sparse voxel-grid PointCloud2 and a 2D OccupancyGrid costmap for visualization.
